title: Fix method narrowing conversion compiler error
body:
A method results in a "narrowing conversion" GCC error, likely due to a missing cast.

Blocks #1538 compile time

e.g. in below, state is a CData but the cast to IData causes the warning. Presumably it should be `= (CData)(Idata)(ret_val)`

```
Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_comparer__Vclpkg__DepSet_h70de7c96__0.cpp: In member function 'virtual void Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_comparer::__VnoInFunc_compare_object(VlProcessRef, Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*, std::string, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_object>, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_object>, CData&)':
Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_comparer__Vclpkg__DepSet_h70de7c96__0.cpp:282:55: error: narrowing conversion of '(IData)ret_val' from 'IData' {aka 'unsigned int'} to 'CData' {aka 'unsigned char'} [-Werror=narrowing]
  282 |                 .__PVT__state = 2U, .__PVT__ret_val = (IData)(ret_val)};
      |                                                       ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
code_blocks:
Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_comparer__Vclpkg__DepSet_h70de7c96__0.cpp: In member function 'virtual void Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_comparer::__VnoInFunc_compare_object(VlProcessRef, Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*, std::string, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_object>, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_object>, CData&)':
Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_comparer__Vclpkg__DepSet_h70de7c96__0.cpp:282:55: error: narrowing conversion of '(IData)ret_val' from 'IData' {aka 'unsigned int'} to 'CData' {aka 'unsigned char'} [-Werror=narrowing]
  282 |                 .__PVT__state = 2U, .__PVT__ret_val = (IData)(ret_val)};
      |                                                       ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
